calendar.matters:
Claimant Scarleth Reyes' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respondent'S Further Responses And Production Of Documents And Things In Response To Claimant'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jennifer Bagosy, Esq. (310.887.1818; jby@bhattorneys.com) of BD&J, PC for Petitioner.
Elmira Danielyan, Esq. (213.412.2661; edanielyan@eghblaw.com) of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum for Respondent (audio only).

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER/CLAIMANT SCARLETH REYES' Motion To Compel Respondent'S Further Responses And Production Of Documents And Things In Response To Claimant'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Claimant's motion to compel respondent's further responses to claimant's requests for production of documents, set one, is granted. The judge pro tem's report and recommendations is adopted. Within 10 days, respondent shall provide a copy of the raw surveillance footage to claimant. No sanctions are awarded.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Claimant Scarleth Reyes' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respondent'S Further Responses To Claimant'S Form Interrogatories Set One, And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jennifer Bagosy, Esq. (310.887.1818; jby@bhattorneys.com) of BD&J, PC for Petitioner.
Elmira Danielyan, Esq. (213.412.2661; edanielyan@eghblaw.com) of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum for Respondent (audio only).

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER/CLAIMANT SCARLETH REYES' Motion To Compel Respondent'S Further Responses To Claimant'S Form Interrogatories Set One, And For Sanctions.

Claimant's motion to compel respondent's further responses to claimant's form interrogatories, set one, is granted. The judge pro tem's report and recommendations is adopted. Within 10 days, respondent shall provide code-compliant responses to the at-issue interrogatories. No sanctions are awarded.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
